sections.paragraph:
ϰαϑεύδω [κατά, εὕδω ‘sleep’]

—1. sleep Mt 13:25; 25:5; 26:40, 43, 45; Mk 4:27, 38; 13:36; Lk 22:46; 1 Th 5:7. The use in Mt 9:24; Mk 5:39; Lk 8:52 may well belong in 2 if the point of these passages is that restoration of life is as easy for Jesus as awakening one from sleep.

—2. in imagery of 1: euphemistically of death 1 Th 5:10. See 1 on Mt 9:24; Mk 5:39; Lk 8:52.

—3. in imagery of 1: of moral/spiritual indifference Eph 5:14; 1 Th 5:6.
